title: Open the manual referencing screen and stop the automatic tipping cycle
summary: Access the operator station HMI screen used for manual maintenance positioning and stop the automatic tipping cycle by navigating to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen with F3 and pressing CYCLE STOP.
when_to_use: Use when preparing to manually position the end effector for maintenance procedures from the operator station HMI, as described in the manual referencing context.
not_for: Do not use as a complete manual referencing procedure; the source text provided here is truncated and does not include the remaining manual referencing or manual movement steps.
Do not use for commissioning parameter changes or other HMI procedures not explicitly covered by this source excerpt.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Navigate to the operator station HMI manual positioning screen and stop the automatic tipping cycle in preparation for maintenance positioning.

safety_notes: This source excerpt is incomplete and only supports the opening HMI navigation and cycle stop actions.
The procedure is associated with maintenance positioning of the end effector; additional safe movement instructions are not present in the supplied source packet.
Escalate before attempting manual movement if further positioning instructions are required.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the operator station HMI
CYCLE STOP control on the HMI

system_preconditions: The operator station HMI is available for use.
The procedure is being performed in the context of maintenance preparation for manual end effector positioning.

visual_references.description: Operator station HMI screen artifact associated with manually referencing axes during maintenance procedures on page 103.
Operator station HMI artifact associated with manually referencing tipper axes during maintenance on page 103.
Operator station control panel figure showing CYCLE STOP and related HMI controls.

steps.title: Open the Visu_Dual_MCP screen
steps.purpose: Access the operator station HMI screen used for manual maintenance positioning actions.
steps.instruction: On the operator station HMI, navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3.
steps.expected_result: The "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen is displayed on the operator station HMI.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator station HMI shows the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen and the user can view the relevant machine control options.
steps.failure_condition: The "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen does not open, F3 navigation is unavailable, or the operator station HMI does not show the expected control screen.

actions.label: Navigate to manual positioning screen
actions.exact_action: Navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Operator station HMI screen associated with manually referencing axes; use it to confirm the correct maintenance-related screen context.
Operator station HMI artifact on page 103 showing the manual referencing context and the Visu_Dual_MCP navigation reference.

stop_or_escalate_if: The HMI does not allow navigation to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen.
The displayed screen does not match the maintenance/manual referencing context supported by the source.
Additional manual movement steps are needed, since they are not included in the supplied source excerpt.

source_evidence.text: On the operator station HMI, navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen (F3).
The procedure instructs the user to navigate to the "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen using F3 and press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.

steps.title: Stop the automatic tipping cycle
steps.purpose: Stop automatic operation before manual maintenance positioning activity.
steps.instruction: Press CYCLE STOP on the operator station HMI to stop the automatic tipping cycle.
steps.expected_result: The automatic tipping cycle is stopped.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI indicates the tipping cycle is no longer running automatically and the station is prepared for the next maintenance-related action.
steps.failure_condition: The automatic tipping cycle continues running, the CYCLE STOP control is unavailable, or the HMI does not reflect that the cycle has stopped.

actions.label: Press cycle stop
actions.exact_action: Press CYCLE STOP to stop the automatic tipping cycle.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Locate the CYCLE STOP control on the operator station control panel figure.
Use the page 103 operator station HMI artifact to confirm the maintenance/manual referencing screen context where CYCLE STOP is used.
Use the page 103 operator station HMI artifact to confirm the same manual referencing context and expected HMI view.

stop_or_escalate_if: CYCLE STOP does not stop the automatic tipping cycle.
The HMI does not show the expected control state after pressing CYCLE STOP.
Further manual positioning instructions are required, because they are not present in the supplied source packet.

success_criteria: The "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen is open on the operator station HMI.
The automatic tipping cycle is stopped.
The system is prepared for subsequent maintenance positioning actions supported elsewhere in the manual.
healthy_conditions: The operator station HMI displays the expected manual referencing or maintenance-related control screen.
CYCLE STOP is available and the automatic tipping cycle is no longer active.
failure_conditions: The "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen cannot be opened from the operator station HMI.
CYCLE STOP does not stop the automatic tipping cycle.
The source excerpt does not provide the remaining manual referencing or manual movement steps needed to continue.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the HMI does not display the expected "Visu_Dual_MCP" screen.
Escalate if pressing CYCLE STOP does not stop the automatic tipping cycle.
Escalate to obtain the complete maintenance/manual referencing procedure before attempting manual end effector movement.
